name: ATX-1
full_name: AEGIS Threat Matrix — Agentic Exploitation and Governance Intelligence Schema
description: A structured adversarial knowledge base for agentic AI behavior. 9 tactics, 25 techniques, 25 mitigations grounded in the Agents of Chaos study (Shapira et al., 2026) with ATM-1 mapping and ACF-1 counterfactual bundle.

artifacts.name: STIX 2.1 Bundle
artifacts.description: Complete taxonomy in STIX 2.1 format — tactics, techniques, mitigations, and relationships

artifacts.name: Technique Database
artifacts.description: All 25 techniques with severity, root cause, case studies, OWASP mapping, and AEGIS mitigations

artifacts.name: Regulatory Cross-Reference
artifacts.description: Techniques mapped to NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, OWASP LLM Top 10, and ATM-1 scenarios

artifacts.name: Technique JSON Schema
artifacts.description: JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for validating ATX-1 technique definitions

artifacts.name: ATT&CK Navigator Layer
artifacts.description: Navigator-compatible layer file (v4.5) for visualization in ATT&CK Navigator

artifacts.name: ATM-1 Mapping
artifacts.description: Bidirectional mapping between ATX-1 techniques and MITRE ATT&CK (ATM-1)

artifacts.name: ACF-1 Counterfactual Bundle
artifacts.description: AEGIS Counterfactual Framework bundle — what-if scenarios for technique interactions

citation.ieee: K. Tannenbaum, "AEGIS: A Constitutional Governance Architecture for Autonomous AI Agents," AEGIS Initiative, 2026, doi: 10.5281/zenodo.19223924.
